message:
feat(cargo): initialize ms CLI project manifest with edition 2024

Add Cargo.toml with comprehensive dependency configuration for the
meta_skill (ms) CLI tool. This establishes the foundation for mining
CASS sessions to generate Claude Code skills.

Key dependencies configured:
- clap v4 (with derive feature) for CLI argument parsing
- rusqlite with bundled SQLite for local storage (WAL mode)
- tantivy for full-text search indexing
- git2 for Git archive integration (dual persistence)
- tokio for async runtime
- serde/toml for configuration serialization
- tracing for structured logging
- criterion for benchmarking

Project structure follows /data/projects/xf architecture pattern with:
- SQLite for fast queries
- Tantivy for full-text search
- Git for audit trail and sync
- Hash embeddings (FNV-1a, 384 dims) for semantic similarity

Includes Cargo.lock with resolved dependency tree (4262+ lines) to
ensure reproducible builds across all development environments.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,124 @@
+[package]
+name = "ms"
+version = "0.1.0"
+edition = "2024"
+resolver = "2"
+authors = ["Jeffrey Emanuel <jeff@jeffreyemanuel.dev>"]
+description = "Meta Skill - Mine CASS sessions to generate Claude Code skills"
+license = "MIT"
+repository = "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/meta_skill"
+homepage = "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/meta_skill"
+keywords = ["cli", "skills", "ai", "claude", "cass"]
+categories = ["command-line-utilities", "development-tools"]
+readme = "README.md"
+rust-version = "1.85"
+exclude = [
+    ".github/",
+    ".beads/",
+    "scripts/",
+    "*.md",
+    "!README.md",
+]
+
+[[bin]]
+name = "ms"
+path = "src/main.rs"
+
+[dependencies]
+# CLI
+clap = { version = "4.5", features = ["derive", "cargo", "env", "unicode", "wrap_help"] }
+clap_complete = "4.5"
+
+# Async runtime
+tokio = { version = "1.0", features = ["rt-multi-thread", "macros", "fs", "io-util", "time", "signal"] }
+
+# Error handling
+thiserror = "1.0"
+anyhow = "1.0"
+
+# Serialization
+serde = { version = "1.0", features = ["derive"] }
+serde_json = "1.0"
+serde_yaml = "0.9"
+toml = "0.8"
+
+# Database
+rusqlite = { version = "0.32", features = ["bundled", "modern_sqlite"] }
+
+# Search
+tantivy = "0.22"
+
+# Git
+git2 = "0.19"
+
+# Terminal output
+colored = "2.1"
+indicatif = "0.17"
+console = "0.15"
+
+# High-performance text processing
+regex = "1.10"
+memchr = "2.7"
+unicode-normalization = "0.1"
+
+# Semantic search / embeddings
+half = "2.4"
+wide = "0.7"
+ring = "0.17"
+
+# Parallelism
+rayon = "1.10"
+crossbeam-channel = "0.5"
+parking_lot = "0.12"
+
+# Logging
+tracing = "0.1"
+tracing-subscriber = { version = "0.3", features = ["env-filter", "fmt", "ansi", "json"] }
+
+# Utilities
+chrono = { version = "0.4", default-features = false, features = ["std", "clock", "serde"] }
+uuid = { version = "1", features = ["v4"] }
+dirs = "5.0"
+walkdir = "2.5"
+glob = "0.3"
+sha2 = "0.10"
+hex = "0.4"
+once_cell = "1.19"
+itertools = "0.13"
+textwrap = "0.16"
+semver = "1.0"
+
+[build-dependencies]
+vergen-gix = { version = "1.0", features = ["build", "cargo", "rustc"] }
+
+[dev-dependencies]
+tempfile = "3.14"
+assert_cmd = "2.0"
+predicates = "3.1"
+insta = "1"
+criterion = { version = "0.5", features = ["html_reports"] }
+
+[features]
+default = []
+
+[[bench]]
+name = "search_perf"
+harness = false
+
+[profile.release]
+opt-level = "z"
+lto = true
+codegen-units = 1
+panic = "abort"
+strip = true
+
+[profile.dev]
+opt-level = 1
+
+[lints.rust]
+unsafe_code = "forbid"
+
+[lints.clippy]
+all = "warn"
+pedantic = "warn"
+nursery = "warn"
